claims.subject: AcrAB-TolC
claims.evidence_span: AcrAB-TolC is the main resistance-nodulation-division efflux pump

claims.subject: MarA
claims.evidence_span: MarA is an AraC/XylS family global regulator that regulates more than 40 genes... including acrAB

claims.subject: N-terminal helix of MarA
claims.evidence_span: N-terminal helix of the AraC/XylS family monomeric regulators as a promising target

claims.subject: N-terminal helix immobilization of MarA
claims.evidence_span: inhibition of efflux by targeting their regulators is a promising strategy to re-sensitize

claims.subject: N-terminal helix of MarA
claims.evidence_span: immobilization of the N-terminal helix of MarA prevents binding to DNA
